title: Preparing for an Interview
content: Marcus had an important job interview scheduled for Monday morning, and he spent the entire weekend preparing for it. He researched the company online, practiced answering common interview questions, and carefully chose his clothes the night before. Despite all the preparation, Marcus still felt anxious when he arrived at the office building. While waiting in the reception area, he noticed his hands were shaking slightly. However, once the interview started, the conversation became more natural and relaxed. The interviewer seemed interested in his previous experience and asked thoughtful questions about his goals. When Marcus left the building, he felt relieved and proud for doing his best, regardless of the final result.
